questions.question: Name the young actress who starred in 1970s Disney films such as Freaky Friday and Candleshoe.

Name the only male artist to receive Grammys for three different categories—jazz, pop, and R&B, with hits "We're in this Love Together" and "Roof Garden."
What 80's political scandal funneled weapons to Nicaraguan rebels, funded through secret weapons sales to the Middle East to secure American captives?
